meta.title: Learn - ADHD Focus, Tools & Strategies | Doubly
meta.description: Plain-language guides on ADHD focus, time-blindness, brain dumping, and getting unstuck. Honest, evidence-based, no shame.
meta.ogDescription: Plain-language guides on ADHD focus, time-blindness, and getting unstuck.
meta.twitterDescription: Plain-language guides on ADHD focus, time-blindness, and getting unstuck.

intro: Plain-language guides on how an ADHD brain handles focus, time, and follow-through. Written with real people in mind, not algorithms. Evidence-based, no shame, no clinical claims.

sections.heading: First articles ship next week
paragraphs: We’re writing the first batch now - covering time-blindness, the science of brain dumping, and why traditional productivity advice keeps failing ADHD adults.
In the meantime, try the [free ADHD pomodoro timer](/tools/pomodoro) or browse the [full tools library](/tools).

cta.headline: Try it in the app
cta.body: The Doubly iOS app helps you start, not just plan. Brain dump the chaos, get one clear next step, and stay accountable to real people who care about your progress.
cta.label: Try it in the app
